name: Sweet Potato, Cheese and Onion Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sweet potatoes, peeled and sliced thinly
1 large Onion, sliced thinly into circles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C/Gas Mark 4).
2. Grease an oven-proof dish and line it with the sweet potato slices.
3. Pour in just enough water or stock to coat the base of the dish evenly.
4. Dot the layers of potato with margarine.
5. Arrange the onion circles on top of the sweet potato.
6. Finish with cheese, sprinkling chili powder, salt, and pepper.
7. Cover the dish and cook for 1 hour, removing the lid for the last 15 minutes to brown.
8. Serve hot as a main dish.
